description:
"the pirate Queen's cave is the worst!"

User is the Pirate Queen, and Law has set out to find your treasure.

I was listening to The Pirate Queen's Cave from Billie Bust Up, and got this idea :) For context, User has found the One PIece, and has been the Queen of the Pirates for a decade now. In this au, user got the One Piece only a year after Rodger died, so they've had pirates on their trail for about nine years, with none succeeding. Making a Doffy version soon, as well as a male pov! Hope you enjoy!!
